,"listen_duration":8597,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9162,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":19882},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7510227812281484094","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没什么好说的，绝对绝对绝对的满分。文笔真的很细腻，作者后期正剧与轻松风融合得非常好，真的彻底喜欢上了梨子！！！绝对值得一读的好文，可以反复刷的类型"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748616006,"group_id":"7424690144248073241","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2475706877225460"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424690144248073241","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":32273,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7436111004122137368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级无敌好看。主角是原世界居民，和七夜是竹马竹马。是无cp兄弟情，但反正我很磕。目前看来整体走轻松搞笑风，在所有斩神同人文里也是别具一格。比较特殊的是这本里对人物之间关系的描写很出众，很多细节可以体现出主角团之间的感情，并不突兀，反而因为一件件小事而慢慢深厚，水到渠成。
个人很喜欢这种轻松风格，有装逼有感动。在原作的基础上做出了适当的改动。但是推荐作者可以适当增加一些正剧的含量，总是一个风格的搞笑看多了也会使读者疲劳。最好和正剧夹杂着来，这样会时不时给读者带来惊喜。
总体来讲真的真的很喜欢！非常期待后文！真的很喜欢梨子和七夜的互动，以及将对方看的十分重要的那份情谊。虽然我也说了我很磕他们的cp，但不得不说的是这份感情并不一定需要是爱情。因为这份情谊已经超出了爱情， 友情，和亲情，他们是彼此的半身，是在任何情况下都可以永远互相信任彼此的关系。","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":20,"text":"竹马竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425764569BA8AA7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227436111004122137368%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227424690144248073241%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":60,"s":56,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425764569BA8AA7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227436111004122137368%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227424690144248073241%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731368604,"group_id":"7424690144248073241","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每天两眼一睁就是看小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2elNYL5IV431/W6ZAVrfMk5XN20N4qa7nN1zKJvZipj","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aee28994c0884aed9714806fda13d7cd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788819&x-signature=imq37dU4gim4QMoNN8bGyctgtIk%3D","user_id":"2475706877225460","user_name":"是RC吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2475706877225460","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_b 0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5594,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":39119},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456086068519142168","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"刷到了很多斩神的视频，但是都好刀啊，林七夜的感情线出现的也好尴尬啊，所以看了这本同人文感觉真棒啊，因为里面有了一个小太阳一样的梨子，所以无论是里面的谁都偏离了原轨，在原本注定了无牵挂，无依无靠的苦难人生中照进了一束阳光真的好好啊，也许不够灿烂但是注定温暖，希望这是他们一亿多次循环里的一次吧，希望他们友谊长存，不要出现奇奇怪怪的感情线了，还有不要出现刀子了，太心痛了[哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736009587,"group_id":"7424690144248073241","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生苦短，何不随性一场，肆意一番","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/uxKe7S3lp7uMbGw5bCcBaRS5v9BXdU/8M3jYt0M3fT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5f01116917ab47739c7fcf940e68fcf3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787288&x-signature=6RrVv6G4aA%2FYpsRi2HMtetFnTpc%3D","user_id":"4182966958041758","user_name":"四夕君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182966958041758","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424690144248073241","book_info":{"abstract":"原内容（已覆盖)目前不是/不包含斩神，看斩神的可以划走了，想看原文请自行千度【双男主+单元故事+伪快穿+abo元素】
